name: Real Numbers
description: Properties of integers, rational numbers, irrational numbers, and decimal expansions.
learning_objective: Understand number-system structure and algorithmic divisibility reasoning.

name: Polynomials
description: Structure, zeroes, algebraic identities, and theorems for polynomial expressions.
learning_objective: Analyse polynomial form, roots, and factorisation behaviour.

name: Triangles
description: Similarity, proportionality, and geometric reasoning in triangles.
learning_objective: Apply triangle similarity and proportionality to solve geometric problems.

name: Introduction to Trigonometry
description: Right-triangle ratios, standard values, identities, and height-distance applications.
learning_objective: Represent geometry numerically using trigonometric ratios and identities.

name: Coordinate Geometry
description: Distance, section formula, and area of triangle on the Cartesian plane.
learning_objective: Use coordinates to compute geometric properties algebraically.

name: Euclid Division Lemma
description: Express integers in the form a = bq + r with 0 <= r < b.
learning_objective: Use the division algorithm to derive quotients and remainders.

name: HCF and LCM
description: Find highest common factor and least common multiple using Euclid's algorithm and prime factorization.
learning_objective: Compute HCF and LCM and connect them to product relationships.

name: Irrational Numbers
description: Recognize and reason about numbers that cannot be written as p/q.
learning_objective: Distinguish rational and irrational expressions with proof-based arguments.

name: Decimal Expansions of Rational Numbers
description: Classify rational numbers by terminating and recurring decimal forms.
learning_objective: Use prime-factor denominators to classify decimal behaviour.

name: Polynomial Degree and Terms
description: Identify coefficients, terms, and degree of a polynomial.
learning_objective: Read algebraic structure before applying root-based methods.

name: Zeroes of a Polynomial
description: Find values of x that make a polynomial equal to zero.
learning_objective: Solve polynomial equations by factorization and inspection.

name: Relationship Between Zeroes and Coefficients
description: Connect sums and products of roots to polynomial coefficients.
learning_objective: Construct and analyse quadratics from root information.

name: Factorisation and Remainder Theorem
description: Use polynomial evaluation to test factors and compute remainders.
learning_objective: Verify factors efficiently and connect division to evaluation.

name: Similar Triangles
description: Use proportional corresponding sides and angle equality to establish similarity.
learning_objective: Identify when two triangles are similar from side or angle conditions.

name: Basic Proportionality Theorem
description: A line parallel to one side of a triangle divides the other two sides proportionally.
learning_objective: Solve segment-length problems produced by parallel-line triangles.

name: Pythagoras Theorem
description: Relate the sides of a right triangle using a^2 + b^2 = c^2.
learning_objective: Compute unknown sides and verify right-angled triangles.

name: Criteria for Similarity and Area Ratio
description: Use similarity criteria and the squared side-ratio rule for triangle areas.
learning_objective: Connect similarity to area scaling and proof-oriented reasoning.

name: Trigonometric Ratios
description: Define sine, cosine, and tangent using right triangles.
learning_objective: Translate triangle side lengths into trigonometric ratios.

name: Standard Trigonometric Values
description: Recall exact values for 0, 30, 45, 60, and 90 degrees.
learning_objective: Use standard values to evaluate expressions quickly.

name: Trigonometric Identities
description: Apply identities such as sin^2(theta) + cos^2(theta) = 1 and 1 + tan^2(theta) = sec^2(theta).
learning_objective: Verify and simplify expressions using core identities.

name: Heights and Distances
description: Model real-world height and distance problems using angles of elevation or depression.
learning_objective: Solve contextual trigonometry problems from diagrams or text.

name: Distance Formula
description: Find the distance between two points using the Euclidean formula.
learning_objective: Compute lengths between coordinates accurately.

name: Section Formula
description: Find the point dividing a segment internally in a given ratio.
learning_objective: Interpolate points on a line segment using weighted averages.

name: Area of a Triangle in Coordinates
description: Compute triangle area from coordinate pairs and detect collinearity.
learning_objective: Use determinant-style formulas for area-based reasoning.
